name: Talon MS (strike)
_doc: Weapon-employment MS payload (docs/03 World 3, level 3.3): one weapon subsystem and one loaded store. Advertises StrikeCapabilityMT + StrikeCapabilityStatusMT at boot. The strike runs on deterministic timings: 2 ticks from EXECUTE to the consent request, 2 ticks from consent APPROVED to COMPLETED. No DLZ — the strike completes on the timer, not on geometry. Deterministic, no RNG (CLAUDE.md rule #3).
